title: No convention governs where the read/output safety cap invariant is enforced
description: No convention governs which boundary owns the read/output safety-cap invariant. DEC-0009 (cap as an output-boundary invariant) was decided in this domain without a governing convention.

evidence.reference: conventions block has no rule covering output-safety invariant placement

proposed_resolution: Author a convention governing output-safety invariant placement; re-point DEC-0009 to item_governed_by_convention; close this gap.
